Package recoder.service

Class DefaultSourceInfo

java.lang.Object
recoder.AbstractService
recoder.service.DefaultProgramModelInfo
recoder.service.DefaultSourceInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
Formats, Service, ChangeHistoryListener, ProgramModelInfo, SourceInfo, TuningParameters
Direct Known Subclasses:
DefaultCrossReferenceSourceInfo
public class DefaultSourceInfo extends DefaultProgramModelInfo implements SourceInfo, ChangeHistoryListener, Formats
Implements queries for program model elements with concrete syntactical representations.

    • getTypeDeclaration

      public final TypeDeclaration getTypeDeclaration(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the syntactical counterpart of the given classtype. Returns null, if the given type is not a type declaration.
      Specified by:
      getTypeDeclaration in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the corresponding type declaration, or null, if the given type has no syntactical representation.

    • getMethodDeclaration

      public final MethodDeclaration getMethodDeclaration(Method m)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the syntactical counterpart of the given method. Returns null, if the given method is not a method declaration.
      Specified by:
      getMethodDeclaration in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      m - a method.
      Returns:
      the corresponding method declaration, or null, if the given method has no syntactical representation.

    • getVariableSpecification

      public final VariableSpecification getVariableSpecification(Variable v)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the syntactical counterpart of the given variable. Returns null, if the given variable is not a variable specification.
      Specified by:
      getVariableSpecification in interface SourceInfo
      Returns:
      the corresponding variable specification, or null, if the given variable has no syntactical representation.

    • getConstructorDeclaration

      public final ConstructorDeclaration getConstructorDeclaration(Constructor c)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the syntactical counterpart of the given method. Returns null, if the given method is not a method declaration.
      Specified by:
      getConstructorDeclaration in interface SourceInfo
      Returns:
      the corresponding method declaration, or null, if the given method has no syntactical representation.

      protected ClassType getFromPackageImports(String name, List<Import> il, ClassType searchingFrom)

    • getLocalType

      protected ClassType getLocalType(String name, TypeScope scope)
      Searches the given type name in the given scope. The name may be a partial name such as A.B where b is a member class of A.

    • getInheritedType

      protected ClassType getInheritedType(String name, ClassType ct)
      Searches an inherited member type of the given name. The method does also report locally defined member types of the given type.

    • getType

      public Type getType(String name, ProgramElement context)
      Tries to find a type with the given name using the given program element as context. Useful to check for name clashes when introducing a new identifier. Neither name nor context may be null.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      name - the name for the type to be looked up; may or may not be qualified.
      context - a program element defining the lookup context (scope).
      Returns:
      the corresponding type (may be null).

    • getType

      public Type getType(TypeReference tr)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the referred type.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      tr - a type reference.
      Returns:
      the referred type (may be null).

    • getType

      public final ClassType getType(TypeDeclaration td)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the declared type.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      td - a type declaration.
      Returns:
      the corresponding type.

    • getType

      public Type getType(VariableSpecification vs)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the type for the variable specification. Implementors should ensure that, if vs is an EnumConstantSpecification, the call is delegated to getType(VariableDefinition).
      Specified by:
      getType in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      vs - a variable specification.
      Returns:
      the type for that variable (may be null).

    • getType

      public Type getType(ProgramElement pe)
      Returns the type of the given program element. For declarations, this is the type declared by the given declaration, for references, this means the referenced type, and for expressions this is the result type.

      WARNING: Most of the times, DefaultNameInfo.getUnknownType() is returned instead of null iff type is unknown. This is the desired behaviour, however, it's not implemented 100% consistently (TODO!!)

      Specified by:
      getType in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      pe - the program element to analyze.
      Returns:
      the type of the program element or null if the type is void; DefaultNameInfo.unknownClassType if the type is unknown or unavailable.

    • getType

      public Type getType(Expression expr)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the type of the given expression (may be null).
      Specified by:
      getType in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      expr - an expression.
      Returns:
      the type of the expression, or null if the type could not be computed.

    • containsTypeParameter

      public boolean containsTypeParameter(Type t)

    • isNarrowingTo

      public boolean isNarrowingTo(Expression expr, PrimitiveType to)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Checks automatic narrowing from compile-time constant ints to byte, char, or short. Returns false if the primitive type is not one of byte, char, short, or if the expression is not a compile-time constant int as defined in the Java language specification.
      Specified by:
      isNarrowingTo in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      expr - the expression that might be a compile-time constant fitting into the given type.
      to - the type that the expression might fit into.
      Returns:
      true if the expression value is "constant" and would fit into a variable of the given type without loss of information, false in any other case.

    • getType

      public Type getType(ProgramModelElement pme)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the type of the given program model element. For types this is the model element itself, for variables it is their defined type and for methods it is their statically defined return type.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      pme - the program model element to analyze.
      Returns:
      the type of the program element or null if the type is unknown or unavailable.

    • getContainingClassType

      public ClassType getContainingClassType(ProgramElement context)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the class type that contains the given program element.
      Specified by:
      getContainingClassType in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      context - a program element.
      Returns:
      the type to which the given program element belongs (may be null).

    • getContainingClassType

      public ClassType getContainingClassType(Member m)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the logical parent class of the given member.
      Specified by:
      getContainingClassType in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      m - a member.
      Returns:
      the class type containing the given member.

    • getInheritedField

      protected Field getInheritedField(String name, ClassType ct)

    • getVariable

      public Variable getVariable(String name, ProgramElement context)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Tries to find a variable with the given name using the given program element as context. The variable may be a local variable, a parameter or a field. Useful to check for name clashes when introducing a new identifier.
      Specified by:
      getVariable in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the variable to be looked up.
      context - a program element defining the lookup context.
      Returns:
      the corresponding variable (may be null).

    • getVariable

      public final Variable getVariable(VariableSpecification vs)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the declared variable.
      Specified by:
      getVariable in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      vs - a variable definition.
      Returns:
      the corresponding variable.

      Parameters:

    • makeSignature

      public List<Type> makeSignature(List<Expression> args)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Creates a signature by resolving the types of the given expression list. An empty or null expression list results in an empty type list.
      Specified by:
      makeSignature in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      args - a list of expressions (may be null).
      Returns:
      a list of types that correspond to the respective expressions.

      Returns the declared method.

    • getMethod

      public Method getMethod(MethodReference mr)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the referred method, if there is an unambiguous one.
      Specified by:
      getMethod in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      mr - the method reference to collate.
      Returns:
      the referred method.
      See Also:
      • SourceInfo.getMethods(MethodReference)

    • getMethods

      public List<Method> getMethods(MethodReference mr)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns all methods that are applicable with respect to the given reference. Only the most specific methods are returned; the program is not semantically correct if there is more than one such method.
      Specified by:
      getMethods in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      mr - the method reference to collate.
      Returns:
      the list of applicable methods.
      See Also:
      • SourceInfo.getMethod(MethodReference)

    • getConstructor

      public Constructor getConstructor(ConstructorReference cr)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the referred constructor, if there is an unambiguous one.
      Specified by:
      getConstructor in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      cr - the constructor reference to collate.
      Returns:
      the constructor referred.
      See Also:
      • SourceInfo.getConstructors(ConstructorReference)

    • getConstructors

      public List<? extends Constructor> getConstructors(ConstructorReference cr)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns all constructors that are applicable with respect to the given reference. Only the most specific constructors are returned; the program is not semantically correct if there is more than one such constructor.
      Specified by:
      getConstructors in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      cr - the constructor reference to collate.
      Returns:
      the list of applicable constructors.
      See Also:
      • SourceInfo.getConstructor(ConstructorReference)

    • getTypes

      public List<TypeDeclaration> getTypes(TypeDeclaration td)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the locally defined inner types of the given type declaration. This method does not report inherited types. The returned list matches the syntactic order of the declarations.
      Specified by:
      getTypes in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      td - a type declaration.
      Returns:
      a list of inner types that are members of the declaration.
      See Also:
      • ProgramModelInfo.getTypes(recoder.abstraction.ClassTypeContainer)
      • ProgramModelInfo.getAllTypes(recoder.abstraction.ClassType)

    • getFields

      public List<FieldSpecification> getFields(TypeDeclaration td)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the locally defined fields of the given type declaration. This method does not report inherited fields. The returned list matches the syntactic order of the declarations.
      Specified by:
      getFields in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      td - a type declaration.
      Returns:
      a list of fields that are members of the declaration.
      See Also:
      • ProgramModelInfo.getFields(recoder.abstraction.ClassType)
      • ProgramModelInfo.getAllFields(recoder.abstraction.ClassType)

    • getMethods

      public List<Method> getMethods(TypeDeclaration td)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the locally defined methods of the given type declaration. This method does not report inherited methods. The returned list matches the syntactic order of the declarations. If td is an enum declaration, implicit members are also added.
      Specified by:
      getMethods in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      td - a type declaration.
      Returns:
      a list of methods that are members of the declaration.
      See Also:
      • ProgramModelInfo.getMethods(recoder.abstraction.ClassType)
      • ProgramModelInfo.getAllMethods(recoder.abstraction.ClassType)

    • getConstructors

      public List<Constructor> getConstructors(TypeDeclaration td)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the locally defined constructors of the given type declaration. The returned list matches the syntactic order of the declarations. This method always returns a non-empty list, at least containing a DefaultConstructor.
      Specified by:
      getConstructors in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      td - a type declaration.
      Returns:
      a list of constructors that are members of the declaration.
      See Also:
      • ProgramModelInfo.getConstructors(recoder.abstraction.ClassType)

    • getPackage

      public Package getPackage(PackageReference pr)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the referred package.
      Specified by:
      getPackage in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      pr - a package reference.
      Returns:
      the referred package (may be null).

      public Package getPackage(ProgramModelElement pme)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the package of the given program model element.
      Specified by:
      getPackage in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      pme - a program model element.
      Returns:
      the package of that object (may be null).

    • getTypes

      public List<? extends ClassType> getTypes(ClassTypeContainer ctc)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the class types locally defined within the given container. Returns inner types when the container itself is a class type. Note that there is no guarantee about the order of the types returned.
      Specified by:
      getTypes in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ctc - a class type container.
      Returns:
      a list of contained class types.

    • getClassTypeContainer

      public ClassTypeContainer getClassTypeContainer(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the class type container for the given class type.
      Specified by:
      getClassTypeContainer in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the container of the given type.

    • getSupertypes

      public List<ClassType> getSupertypes(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the list of locally declared supertypes of the given class type.
      Specified by:
      getSupertypes in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the list of locally defined supertypes of the given type.

    • getFields

      public List<? extends Field> getFields(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the fields locally defined within the given class type. If the type is represented in source code, the returned list matches the syntactic order.
      Specified by:
      getFields in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the list of field members of the given type.

    • getMethods

      public List<Method> getMethods(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the methods locally defined within the given class type. If the type is represented in source code, the returned list matches the syntactic order.
      Specified by:
      getMethods in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the list of methods of the given type.

    • getConstructors

      public List<? extends Constructor> getConstructors(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the constructors locally defined within the given class type. If the type is represented in source code, the returned list matches the syntactic order.
      Specified by:
      getConstructors in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the list of constructors of the given type.

    • getSignature

      public List<Type> getSignature(Method m)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the signature of the given method or constructor.
      Specified by:
      getSignature in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      m - a method (or constructor).
      Returns:
      the signature of the given method.

    • getExceptions

      public List<ClassType> getExceptions(Method m)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the exceptions of the given method or constructor. If the method is represented in source code, the returned list matches the syntactic order.
      Specified by:
      getExceptions in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      m - a method (or constructor).
      Returns:
      the exceptions of the given method.

    • getReturnType

      public Type getReturnType(Method m)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the return type of the given method.
      Specified by:
      getReturnType in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      m - a method.
      Returns:
      the return type of the given method.

    • getAnnotationType

      public Type getAnnotationType(AnnotationUseSpecification au)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the (annotation) type of the given annotation use.
      Specified by:
      getAnnotationType in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      au - an annotation use
      Returns:
      the type of the referenced annotation type

    • resolveURQ

      public Reference resolveURQ(UncollatedReferenceQualifier urq)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Replaces the uncollated qualifier by its proper counterpart. Returns null, if this was not possible, the replaced reference otherwise. Note that this method does not notify the change history of the change!
      Specified by:
      resolveURQ in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      urq - an uncollated reference.
      Returns:
      a resolved reference, or null if the reference could not be resolved.

    • resolveURQ

      protected Reference resolveURQ(UncollatedReferenceQualifier urq, boolean allowVariables)

    • getSucceedingStatements

      public List<Statement> getSucceedingStatements(Statement s)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns this list of statements that will possibly be executed after the specified statement. This method defines the edges of a control flow graph and obeys the Java compile-time definitions for reachability. The graph is not transitive: The last statement of a loop will return the loop as successor only, and the loop may have a successor that actually leaves the loop. Statement that can leave the top level statement block will report SourceInfo.METHOD_EXITas a successor.
      Specified by:
      getSucceedingStatements in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      s - a statement.
      Returns:
      a list of succeeding statements.

    • register

      public void register(ProgramElement pe)
      Analyzes the given program subtree. It is required that the tree has consistent parent links; this is done by the parser frontends or by calling make(All)ParentRole(s)Valid(). If the program element is not a CompilationUnit, it must have a valid parent.
      Specified by:
      register in interface SourceInfo
      Parameters:
      pe - the program element to add.

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Overrides:
      reset in class DefaultProgramModelInfo
